instruction: I'm a bit hungry. First, please go to the kitchen to get the bread and bring it to the dining table in the bedroom. After that, pick up a box from the dining table and take it back to the kitchen.
target_description: I'm a bit hungry. First, please go to the kitchen to get the bread and bring it to the dining table in the bedroom. After that, pick up a box from the dining table and take it back to the kitchen.
